zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bigbury於大約1312年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親William de Bigbury II25歲，母親Maude de Braose11歲。她於大約1263年與Roger de Prideaux II在英國英格蘭可瓦爾帕德斯托福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bigbury于大约1312年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲William de Bigbury II25岁，母亲Maude de Braose11岁。她于大约1263年与Roger de Prideaux II在英国英格兰可瓦爾帕德斯托福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1348年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bigbury was born about 1312, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Bigbury II, was 25 and her mother, Maude de Braose, was 11. She married Roger de Prideaux II about 1263, in Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1348.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bigbury est née environ 1312, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Bigbury II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maude de Braose, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Prideaux II environ 1263, à Padstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1348.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bigbury um 1312 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Bigbury II 25 und ihre Mutter Maude de Braose 11. Sie hat um 1263 in Padstow, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Roger de Prideaux II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1348.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bigbury è nata il circa 1312 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Bigbury II, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Maude de Braose, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Prideaux II circa 1263, nel Padstow, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1348.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bigburyが約1312年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William de Bigbury IIは25歳，母Maude de Braoseは11歳であった。約1263年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルプアドストウでRoger de Prideaux IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bigbury(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Bigbury II(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude de Braose(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 파드스타우에서 Roger de Prideaux II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bigbury nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Bigbury II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Braose, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Prideaux II aproximadamente 1263, em Padstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1348.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bigbury родилась около 1312 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Bigbury II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Braose, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Prideaux II около 1263 г. в местности падстоу, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1348 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bigbury nació aproximadamente 1312, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Bigbury II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maude de Braose, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Roger de Prideaux II aproximadamente 1263, en Padstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1348.
